title: [CI:DOCS] Configure Renovate
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com) Welcome to [Renovate](https://togithub.com/renovatebot/renovate)! This is an onboarding PR to help you understand and configure settings before regular Pull Requests begin. 🚦 To activate Renovate, merge this Pull Request. To disable Renovate, simply close this Pull Request unmerged. --- ### Detected Package Files * `contrib/docker/Dockerfile` (dockerfile) * `hack/Dockerfile` (dockerfile) * `.github/workflows/check_cirrus_cron.yml` (github-actions) * `.github/workflows/pr.yml` (github-actions) * `.github/workflows/rerun_cirrus_cron.yml` (github-actions) * `.github/workflows/stale.yml` (github-actions) * `go.mod` (gomod) ### Configuration 🔡 Renovate has detected a custom config for this PR. Feel free to ask for [help](https://togithub.com/renovatebot/renovate/discussions) if you have any doubts and would like it reviewed. Important: Now that this branch is edited, Renovate can't rebase it from the base branch any more. If you make changes to the base branch that could impact this onboarding PR, please merge them manually. ### What to Expect With your current configuration, Renovate will create 12 Pull Requests:
[skip-ci] Update tim-actions/get-pr-commits digest to 55b867b - Schedule: ["at any time"] - Branch name: `renovate/tim-actions-get-pr-commits-digest` - Merge into: `main` - Upgrade [tim-actions/get-pr-commits](https://togithub.com/tim-actions/get-pr-commits) to `55b867b9b28954e6f5c1a0fe2f729dc926c306d0`

chore(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/image-spec to v1.0.2 - Schedule: ["at any time"] - Branch name: `renovate/github.com-opencontainers-image-spec-1.x` - Merge into: `main` - Upgrade [github.com/opencontainers/image-spec](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/image-spec) to `67d2d5658fe0476ab9bf414cec164077ebff3920`
fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/containerd to v1.6.17 - Schedule: ["at any time"] - Branch name: `renovate/github.com-containerd-containerd-1.x` - Merge into: `main` - Upgrade [github.com/containerd/containerd](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd) to `v1.6.17`
fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.24.1 - Schedule: ["at any time"] - Branch name: `renovate/github.com-containers-image-v5-5.x` - Merge into: `main` - Upgrade [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://togithub.com/containers/image) to `v5.24.1`

If you need any further assistance then you can also [request help here](https://togithub.com/renovatebot/renovate/discussions). --- This PR has been generated by [Mend Renovate](https://www.mend.io/free-developer-tools/renovate/). comments.body:
Force-push: Updated commit message to force renovate to run again.  This dependency should not be showing up:

`fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v1`

Ugh, I can't figure it out.  I'm calling it a 'glitch' at this point, c/common v1 and v1.0.1 are both excluded in the default (imported) configuration and blocked in other repos. properly.  I'm going to call this PR ready, and after it merges will keep an eye out for a "bad" c/common update PR.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *renovate[bot]*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Followup: I confirmed, renovate did **not** open a PR for c/common v1 or v1.0.1 (both are blacklisted).  This is what I was hoping would happen.
